name: io.github.wtthornton/docs-mcp
title: DocsMCP
description: MCP server for automated documentation generation, validation, and maintenance. Generates READMEs, changelogs, API docs, ADRs, onboarding guides, and diagrams. Validates documentation drift, completeness, links, freshness, style, and cross-references.

environmentVariables.name: DOCS_MCP_PROJECT_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Project root directory for file operations (defaults to current working directory)

environmentVariables.name: CONTEXT7_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Context7 documentation enrichment (optional)

tools.name: docs_project_scan
tools.description: Comprehensive documentation state audit with completeness scoring

tools.name: docs_api_surface
tools.description: Analyze public API surface of a Python file

tools.name: docs_git_summary
tools.description: Git history with conventional commit parsing

tools.name: docs_generate_changelog
tools.description: Generate CHANGELOG from git tags and commits

tools.name: docs_generate_epic
tools.description: Generate epic planning docs with expert enrichment

tools.name: docs_generate_story
tools.description: Generate user story docs with expert enrichment

tools.name: docs_generate_prompt
tools.description: Generate reusable prompt templates from project context

tools.name: docs_check_drift
tools.description: Detect code changes not reflected in docs

tools.name: docs_check_links
tools.description: Validate internal links in markdown files

tools.name: docs_validate_epic
tools.description: Validate epic documents for completeness and consistency

tools.name: docs_check_diataxis
tools.description: Diataxis quadrant coverage analysis and balance scoring

tools.name: docs_generate_interactive_diagrams
tools.description: Interactive HTML viewer with pan/zoom for Mermaid diagrams

tools.name: docs_check_style
tools.description: Deterministic style and tone checks for markdown (passive voice, jargon, headings, etc.)
